single_responsibility: Alt-text generation, WebP conversion, lazy-load, schema injection

output.optimized_refs: array<{original_src, webp_path, alt_text, lazy_load: true, schema_type: string}>
output.assets_seo_json: object<{image_path: {alt, format, size_kb, schema, lazy_load, wcag_contrast_pass}}>

writes: updated Markdown files (image refs updated in-place)
